basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Research Fellow and Research Associate-I Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow and Research Associate-I
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Junior Research Fellow and Research Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in Information Technology/Computer Science & Engineering, B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Mathematics and Computing, Five years integrated BS-MS in Mathematics and Computing, PhD in Computer Science and Engineering/Mathematics & Computing with specialization in cryptography or security, GATE CS or UGC-NET qualified
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M.E./M.Tech. in Information Tech./Computer Science & Engineering OR B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Sc. & Engineering/Information Technology/Mathematics and Computing or equivalent OR Five years integrated BS-MS in Mathematics and Computing or equivalent with CGPA above 8 (or 80% marks) and GATE qualified in CS OR UGC-NET qualified. Research Associate-I: PhD degree in Computer Science and Engineering/Mathematics & Computing or related disciplines with specialization in cryptography or security.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000 + HRA Per Month Research Associate-I: Rs. 58,000 + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Roorkee Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Roorkee Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the IIT Roorkee recruitment is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by IIT Roorkee for the posts of Junior Research Fellow and Research Associate-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position offers a salary of Rs. 37,000 + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: For the Research Associate-I post, candidates must hold a PhD degree in Computer Science and Engineering/Mathematics & Computing or related disciplines with specialization in cryptography or security.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Roorkee recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow and Research Associate-I positions will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates are required to submit their applications via post.
